mapper.select: SELECT id, batch_id, qr_token, status, created_at, expired_at, remark, status_reason, generated_by, last_query_at, pv FROM qr_code WHERE batch_id = #{batchId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, batch_id, qr_token, status, created_at, expired_at, remark, status_reason, generated_by, last_query_at, pv FROM qr_code WHERE qr_token = #{token} LIMIT 1

SELECT tb.id, tb.batch_code, bp.name AS product_name, bp.category AS product_category, bp.spec AS product_spec, bp.unit AS product_unit, oc.name AS company_name, tb.origin_place, tb.start_date, tb.status, tb.regulation_status, tb.public_remark FROM trace_batch tb LEFT JOIN base_product bp ON tb.product_id = bp.id LEFT JOIN org_company oc ON tb.company_id = oc.id WHERE tb.id = #{batchId} LIMIT 1
